aiCommentCN: 市场有节奏，心跳没规律。
aiCommentEN: Markets have rhythm, but hearts don't.
aiSummaryCN:
【交易观点】
比特币短期内可能会继续下跌。
【关键位置】
68,000 美元以下为关键支撑位。
【短线策略】
可以尝试低位买入，目标价位为 70,000 美元。
【风险提醒】
请注意市场波动风险，设置好止损位。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin may continue to decline in the short term.
[Key Drivers]
$68,000 is the key support level.
[Outlook]
Try to buy at low positions, with a target price of $70,000.
[Reminder]
Please note the market fluctuation risk and set a stop-loss position.
